title.en: Time for Lamine Yamal to ignite? Or another Mbappe World Cup masterclass?
title.zh-CN: 是时候让Lamine Yamal点燃了？还是另一个Mbappe世界杯大师班？

summary.en: France face Spain for a place in the World Cup final on Tuesday, meaning a showdown between Kylian Mbappe and Lamine Yamal. Who comes out on top?
summary.zh-CN: 法国队在周二的世界杯决赛中面对西班牙队，这意味着Kylian Mbappe和Lamine Yamal之间的对决。谁位居榜首？

title.en: Who will win the World Cup? The view from the semi-finalists
title.zh-CN: 谁将赢得世界杯？半决赛选手的观点

summary.en: BBC Sport speaks to journalists and fans from the World Cup's four semi-finalists to see who they think will win the tournament.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台采访了世界杯四名半决赛选手的记者和球迷，看看他们认为谁将赢得比赛。

title.en: Deschamps predicts 'spectacular' France v Spain semi-final
title.zh-CN: 德尚预测“壮观”的法国vs西班牙半决赛

summary.en: France boss Didier Deschamps is predicting a "spectacular" semi-final when his exciting side take on Spain in a heavyweight World Cup showdown in Dallas.
summary.zh-CN: 法国老板迪迪埃·德尚（ Didier Deschamps ）预测，当他令人兴奋的球队在达拉斯的重量级世界杯摊牌中对阵西班牙时，将会有一场“壮观”的半决赛。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 37
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星37号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: All the goals from France's run to semi-finals
title.zh-CN: 从法国队到半决赛的所有进球

summary.en: Watch every goal scored by France on their way to the 2026 World Cup semi-finals and a mouth-watering tie against Spain.
summary.zh-CN: 观看法国在进入2026年世界杯半决赛的路上打进的每一个进球，以及与西班牙的比赛。

title.en: Spain's road to semi-final - every goal so far
title.zh-CN: 西班牙的半决赛之路-迄今为止的每一个进球

summary.en: Relive every goal Spain have scored on their way to the 2026 World Cup semi-finals, where a thrilling meeting with France at Dallas Stadium awaits.
summary.zh-CN: 重温西班牙在2026年世界杯半决赛中取得的每一个进球，在达拉斯体育场与法国队进行激动人心的会面。

title.en: Chermiti claims no plans to leave Rangers - gossip
title.zh-CN: Chermiti声称没有计划离开游骑兵-八卦

summary.en: Youssef Chermiti says he has no intention of leaving Rangers, but Celtic's Daizen Maeda repeats his ambition to play in England's Premier League as Heart of Midlothian are told one of their targets...
summary.zh-CN: Youssef Chermiti表示他无意离开流浪者队，但凯尔特人的Daizen Maeda重申了他在英格兰超级联赛中的雄心壮志，因为中洛锡安之心被告知他们的目标之一......

title.en: Rice fit and available to start for England vs Argentina
title.zh-CN: 适合大米，可以从英格兰开始，也可以从阿根廷开始

summary.en: Declan Rice is fit and available to start England's World Cup semi-final against Argentina on Wednesday, Sky Sports News understands.
summary.zh-CN: 天空体育新闻了解到， Declan Rice适合在周三对阵阿根廷的比赛中开始英格兰世界杯半决赛。

title.en: 'A little lost' - Why has Mainoo become England's forgotten man?
title.zh-CN: “有点失落” -为什么Mainoo成为英格兰被遗忘的人？

summary.en: Kobbie Mainoo has cut a pretty forlorn-looking figure at this World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 科比·梅努（ Kobbie Mainoo ）在本届世界杯上剪辑了一个看起来很孤独的身材。

title.en: 'Easy to create divisions' - Kane says England are 'completely together'
title.zh-CN: “轻松创建分区” -凯恩说英格兰“完全在一起”

summary.en: England captain Harry Kane says the squad are "completely together" before their World Cup semi-final against Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队队长哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）表示，在对阵阿根廷的世界杯半决赛之前，球队“完全在一起”。

title.en: Dutch referee dies weeks after being dropped from World Cup
title.zh-CN: 荷兰裁判在世界杯被淘汰数周后去世

summary.en: Dutch football referee Rob Dieperink dies aged 38, weeks after he was dropped from officiating at the World Cup because of a police investigation in the UK.
summary.zh-CN: 荷兰足球裁判罗布·迪佩林克（ Rob Dieperink ）因英国警方调查而被撤销世界杯主席职务，几周后，他去世，享年38岁。

title.en: Chris Sutton's World Cup semi-final predictions
title.zh-CN: 克里斯·萨顿的世界杯半决赛预测

summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台的足球专家克里斯·萨顿（ Chris Sutton ）对2026年世界杯的半决赛关系做出了预测。

title.zh-CN: 借鞋，不穿金靴--世界杯最伟大得分手的故事

summary.zh-CN: 只是方丹在一届世界杯上打进13球的纪录已经保持了几十年，但在28岁的伤病结束了他的职业生涯后，他再也没有参加过比赛。
